title: Predicting Resolved Dust Attenuation from Local Galaxy Properties Using MaNGA
summary: Accurate spatially resolved dust corrections are critical for interpreting the structure and evolution of star-forming galaxies (SFGs). We present an empirical model for predicting spatially resolved dust attenuation ($A_V$) in SFGs using integral field spectroscopy from the Mapping Nearby Galaxies at Apache Point Observatory (MaNGA) survey. Using a sample of 5,155 galaxies over $7.20<M_\ast<11.14$ and $0.0002 < z < 0.1444$, we derive $A_V$ maps from the Balmer decrement across more than 1,898,954 star-forming spaxels. Using local star formation rate surface density ($Σ_{\text{SFR}}$) as a predictor, the model achieves $R^2 = 0.69$ and RMSE $=0.22$ mag, with residuals that are approximately Gaussian and centred near zero. It predicts $A_V$ within a factor of $\sim$1.3 on kpc scales. We also demonstrate that the relation can be applied iteratively to recover dust-corrected $Σ_{\mathrm{SFR}}$ from uncorrected values, converging by the fourth iteration with minimal residual bias ($-0.01$ mag) and low RMSE ($0.42$ mag). The model accurately reproduces $A_V$ maps across diverse morphologies and orientations, including edge-on systems. It also recovers the observed radial $A_V$ profiles, capturing their dependence on stellar mass and relative star formation activity, with more massive and more strongly star-forming galaxies showing steeper gradients.

AI.tldr: 该研究基于MaNGA巡天的积分场光谱数据，开发了一个经验模型来预测恒星形成星系中空间分辨的尘埃消光（A_V），使用局部恒星形成率面密度作为预测因子，在千秒差距尺度上预测精度达到因子~1.3。
AI.motivation: 准确的空间分辨尘埃校正确保了正确解读恒星形成星系的结构和演化，但现有方法存在局限性，需要更可靠的尘埃消光预测模型。
AI.method: 使用MaNGA巡天的积分场光谱数据，基于巴尔末减幅推导A_V图，利用局部恒星形成率面密度（Σ_SFR）作为预测因子建立经验模型，样本包含5,155个星系和超过189万个恒星形成像素。
AI.result: 模型达到R²=0.69和RMSE=0.22星等，在千秒差距尺度上预测精度为因子~1.3；能够准确再现不同形态和取向星系的A_V图，并恢复观测到的径向A_V剖面，捕捉到其与恒星质量和相对恒星形成活动的依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 该经验模型为恒星形成星系提供了可靠的空间分辨尘埃消光预测工具，能够准确恢复尘埃校正后的恒星形成率面密度，并捕捉到星系尘埃分布的关键物理依赖关系。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究尘埃消光（A_V）的预测模型，与用户兴趣画像中的“dust”和“star-forming galaxies”等关键词有一定关联，但核心主题是星系内尘埃消光的经验建模，而非用户主要关注的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或多相气体。论文使用MaNGA巡天数据，不涉及引力透镜方法，且作者列表中无用户核心作者。因此，虽然存在部分主题重叠，但整体相关性有限。
recommendation.topic_fit: 部分匹配：涉及尘埃和恒星形成星系，但非强引力透镜或高红移星系动力学核心主题。
recommendation.method_fit: 不匹配：使用积分场光谱和巴尔末减幅，非引力透镜方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 不匹配：作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等：提出经验模型预测空间分辨尘埃消光，但方法本身并非全新。
recommendation.negative_reason: 非用户核心领域：不涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移偏振或多相气体。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 准确的空间分辨尘埃校正是解释恒星形成星系（SFGs）结构和演化的关键。我们利用阿帕奇点天文台邻近星系巡天（MaNGA）的积分场光谱，提出了一个预测SFGs中空间分辨尘埃消光（$A_V$）的经验模型。基于5,155个星系（覆盖$7.20<M_\ast<11.14$和$0.0002 < z < 0.1444$）的样本，我们从超过1,898,954个恒星形成空间像素的巴尔默递减推导出$A_V$图。使用局部恒星形成率面密度（$Σ_{\text{SFR}}$）作为预测因子，该模型实现了$R^2 = 0.69$和均方根误差（RMSE）$=0.22$ mag，残差近似高斯分布且中心接近零。它能在kpc尺度上以约1.3倍因子内预测$A_V$。我们还证明，该关系可迭代应用于从未校正值恢复尘埃校正后的$Σ_{\mathrm{SFR}}$，在第四次迭代时收敛，残余偏差极小（$-0.01$ mag）且RMSE较低（$0.42$ mag）。该模型能准确再现不同形态和取向（包括侧向星系）的$A_V$图，并恢复观测到的径向$A_V$轮廓，捕捉其对恒星质量和相对恒星形成活动的依赖性，其中质量更大、恒星形成更活跃的星系显示出更陡的梯度。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该经验模型为恒星形成星系提供了可靠的空间分辨尘埃消光预测工具，能够准确恢复尘埃校正后的恒星形成率面密度，并捕捉到星系尘埃分布的关键物理依赖关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Corner plot showing the distributions and intrinsic relations between \(\log_{10}\,\Sigma_{\ast}\) , \(\log_{10}\,\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) , \(R/R_{e}\) , and \(A_{V}\) for star-forming spaxels in our sample. The diagonal panels display one-dimensional histograms with vertical lines marking the 16th, 50th, and 84th percentiles. The lower–triangle panels show the corresponding distributions with contours enclosing 25%, 50%, and 90% of the data, with Spearman correlation coefficients \(r\) indicated in each panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：角点图展示了样本中恒星形成空间像素的 \(\log_{10}\,\Sigma_{\ast}\) 、 \(\log_{10}\,\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) 、 \(R/R_{e}\) 和 \(A_{V}\) 的分布及内在关系。对角线面板显示一维直方图，竖线标记第16、50和84百分位数。下三角面板显示相应的分布，等高线包围25%、50%和90%的数据，每个面板中标注了斯皮尔曼相关系数 \(r\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Residual distributions ( \(A_{V}-A_{V,{pred}}\) ) for different OLS linear models. The x-axis shows residuals between observed and predicted \(A_{V}\) , and the y-axis shows the number of spaxels per bin. Each model, based on different combinations of predictors, is colour-coded.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：不同OLS线性模型的残差分布（ \(A_{V}-A_{V,{pred}}\) ）。x轴显示观测值与预测值 \(A_{V}\) 之间的残差，y轴显示每个区间内的空间像素数量。基于不同预测因子组合的每个模型以不同颜色编码。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the OLS regression models predicting \(A_{V}\) from different combinations of spatially-resolved galaxy properties: stellar mass surface density ( \(\Sigma_{\ast}\) ), star formation rate surface density ( \(\Sigma_{{\text{SFR}}}\) ), and normalised galactocentric radius ( \(R/R_{e}\) ). The left block lists the fitted regression coefficients, while the right block reports model performance metrics: coefficient of determination ( \(R^{2}\) ), reduced chi-square (Red. \(\chi^{2}\) ), root-mean-square error (RMSE), the 16th/50th/84th percentiles of the residuals, and the Kolmogorov–Smirnov (KS) statistic of residual normality.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：基于不同空间分辨星系属性组合预测 \(A_{V}\) 的OLS回归模型总结：恒星质量面密度（ \(\Sigma_{\ast}\) ）、恒星形成率面密度（ \(\Sigma_{{\text{SFR}}}\) ）和归一化星系中心距离（ \(R/R_{e}\) ）。左侧块列出拟合的回归系数，右侧块报告模型性能指标：决定系数（ \(R^{2}\) ）、约化卡方（Red. \(\chi^{2}\) ）、均方根误差（RMSE）、残差的第16/50/84百分位数，以及残差正态性的科尔莫戈罗夫-斯米尔诺夫（KS）统计量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Distribution of \(A_{V}\) over the \(\log\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) - \(\log\Sigma_{\ast}\) plane. Panels (a) and (b) show the observed and predicted (see Equation 8 ) median \(A_{V}\) values per bin (0.05 dex), respectively. Panels (c) and (d) display the median residuals ( \(A_{V}^{{obs}}-A_{V}^{{pred}}\) ) and associated standard deviation, \(\sigma\left(A_{V}^{{obs}}-A_{V}^{{pred}}\right)\) , respectively. Black contours enclose 90% and 50% of the sample.
figures.caption_zh: 图3： \(A_{V}\) 在 \(\log\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) - \(\log\Sigma_{\ast}\) 平面上的分布。面板(a)和(b)分别显示每个区间（0.05 dex）内观测和预测（见方程8）的中值 \(A_{V}\) 值。面板(c)和(d)分别显示中值残差（ \(A_{V}^{{obs}}-A_{V}^{{pred}}\) ）及其标准差 \(\sigma\left(A_{V}^{{obs}}-A_{V}^{{pred}}ight)\) 。黑色等高线包围90%和50%的样本。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Residuals of the predicted \(A_{V}\) from the empirical model as a function of (from left to right) observed \(A_{V}\) , \(\log_{10}\Sigma_{\ast}\) , \(\log_{10}(\Sigma_{{SFR}})\) , and normalised galactocentric radius ( \(R/R_{e}\) ). In each panel, colours indicate the median \(\log_{10}\) H \(\beta\) SNR in each 2D bin, with 50% and 90% spaxel density contours overlaid in black. Horizontal dashed lines mark zero residual. The rightmost panel shows the overall residual distribution as a histogram.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：经验模型预测的 \(A_{V}\) 残差作为（从左到右）观测 \(A_{V}\) 、 \(\log_{10}\Sigma_{\ast}\) 、 \(\log_{10}(\Sigma_{{SFR}})\) 和归一化星系中心距离（ \(R/R_{e}\) ）的函数。每个面板中，颜色表示每个二维区间内中值 \(\log_{10}\) H \(\beta\) 信噪比，黑色叠加了50%和90%的空间像素密度等高线。水平虚线标记零残差。最右侧面板以直方图显示整体残差分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Residuals of the predicted \(A_{V}\) from the iterative empirical correction. From left to right: (1) distributions of residuals for the first five iterations, (2) RMSE of the residuals as a function of iteration number, and (3) median residual offset as a function of iteration. Dashed vertical and horizontal lines indicate zero residual.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：迭代经验校正预测的 \(A_{V}\) 残差。从左到右：(1)前五次迭代的残差分布，(2)残差均方根误差随迭代次数的变化，(3)中值残差偏移随迭代次数的变化。虚线和水平线表示零残差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Comparison between predicted and Balmer–decrement corrected \(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) after four iterations of the empirical attenuation relation. The colour map shows the spaxel density in the 2D histogram, with only bins containing at least 15 spaxels displayed. The dashed line indicates the one-to-one relation, and black contours enclose 50% and 90% of the spaxels.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：经过四次经验消光关系迭代后，预测的 \(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) 与巴尔默递减校正后的 \(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) 比较。颜色图显示二维直方图中的空间像素密度，仅显示包含至少15个空间像素的区间。虚线表示一对一关系，黑色等高线包围50%和90%的空间像素。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Comparison of observed and predicted \(A_{V}\) maps for five representative MaNGA galaxies. Each row corresponds to a galaxy, and the columns show: (1) the observed \(A_{V}\) derived from the BD, (2) the \(A_{V}\) predicted by our model using \(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) , (3) the residual map annotated with the median \(|\Delta A_{V}|\) for each galaxy, and (4) the \(\chi^{2}\) map computed from residuals and observational uncertainties. The sample includes an edge-on galaxy, two bulge-dominated galaxies, and two disk-dominated galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：五个代表性MaNGA星系的观测与预测 \(A_{V}\) 图比较。每行对应一个星系，列显示：(1)从巴尔默递减推导的观测 \(A_{V}\) ，(2)我们的模型使用 \(\Sigma_{{SFR}}\) 预测的 \(A_{V}\) ，(3)残差图，标注了每个星系的中值 \(|\Delta A_{V}|\) ，(4)根据残差和观测不确定性计算的 \(\chi^{2}\) 图。样本包括一个侧向星系、两个核球主导星系和两个盘主导星系。

title: A Unified Origin of Primordial Black Hole Dark Matter and Nanohertz Gravitational Waves
summary: Recent high-cadence observations by Subaru-HSC have identified a population of ultrashort-timescale microlensing events, providing a compelling window for planet-mass primordial black holes (PBHs) to constitute the entirety of dark matter. In this Letter, we demonstrate that this PBH population and the nanohertz stochastic gravitational-wave (GW) background reported by pulsar timing arrays (PTAs) can be naturally unified by a single primordial origin: a broad, nearly-flat enhancement of the curvature power spectrum with an amplitude of $O(10^{-2})$. The resulting PBH mass function spans the planet-to-solar mass range, while remaining consistent with all current observational constraints. This unified PBH--induced-GW framework makes concrete multi-messenger predictions, which can be decisively scrutinized by forthcoming microlensing surveys, next-generation PTAs, space-borne interferometers, precision astrometry, and laser ranging experiments.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出一个统一框架，将Subaru-HSC观测到的超短时标微引力透镜事件与脉冲星计时阵列探测到的纳赫兹随机引力波背景联系起来，认为它们都源于原始曲率功率谱的平坦增强，支持原始黑洞构成全部暗物质的可能性。
AI.motivation: 最近Subaru-HSC的高频观测发现了超短时标微引力透镜事件，为行星质量原始黑洞构成全部暗物质提供了证据。同时，脉冲星计时阵列探测到了纳赫兹随机引力波背景。本研究旨在探索这两个看似不同的观测现象是否具有共同的原始起源。
AI.method: 提出一个统一的理论框架：假设原始曲率功率谱存在一个宽泛、近乎平坦的增强，振幅约为O(10^{-2})。这种增强会产生跨越行星质量到太阳质量范围的原始黑洞质量函数，同时产生可观测的引力波背景。
AI.result: 该框架能够自然地统一解释超短时标微引力透镜事件和纳赫兹随机引力波背景，产生的原始黑洞质量函数与所有当前观测约束一致。原始黑洞可以构成全部暗物质，同时产生观测到的引力波信号。
AI.conclusion: 原始黑洞-诱导引力波统一框架做出了具体的多信使预测，可以通过未来的微引力透镜巡天、下一代脉冲星计时阵列、空间干涉仪、精密天体测量和激光测距实验进行决定性检验。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要讨论原始黑洞作为暗物质以及纳赫兹引力波背景的统一起源，虽然涉及暗物质这一泛关键词，但核心科学问题是宇宙学早期扰动和引力波，而非用户主要关注的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体或尘埃等方向。论文未使用引力透镜方法，也未涉及用户核心作者。因此相关性很低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 仅匹配泛关键词'dark matter'，但论文主题（原始黑洞、引力波背景）与用户主要兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系）偏离较大。
recommendation.method_fit: 论文采用理论模型和功率谱分析，未涉及引力透镜、ALMA、JWST等用户常用方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 论文作者（Guillem Domènech, Shi Pi, Ao Wang）均不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文提出统一框架解释两类观测，具有一定新颖性，但与用户领域无关。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题属于宇宙学/粒子物理范畴，与用户主要研究领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系）不匹配。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 近期Subaru-HSC的高频次观测识别出了一群超短时标微引力透镜事件，为行星质量原始黑洞（PBHs）构成全部暗物质提供了一个引人注目的窗口。在本快报中，我们证明这群PBH与脉冲星计时阵列（PTAs）报告的纳赫兹随机引力波（GW）背景可以自然地由一个单一的原始起源统一：曲率功率谱的一个宽且近乎平坦的增强，其振幅为$O(10^{-2})$。由此产生的PBH质量函数跨越行星到太阳质量范围，同时与所有当前的观测约束保持一致。这一统一的PBH诱导GW框架做出了具体的多信使预测，这些预测可以通过即将进行的微引力透镜巡天、下一代PTAs、空间干涉仪、精密天体测量和激光测距实验进行决定性检验。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，原始黑洞-诱导引力波统一框架做出了具体的多信使预测，可以通过未来的微引力透镜巡天、下一代脉冲星计时阵列、空间干涉仪、精密天体测量和激光测距实验进行决定性检验。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : The blue and red shaded contours show the 68% (1 \(\sigma\) ) and 95% (2 \(\sigma\) ) C.L. allowed regions of PBH abundance when all 12 microlensing candidates (“S12”) or the 4 secure candidates (“S4”) of Subaru-HSC are attributed to PBHs, respectively [ 21 ] . The 95% C.L. allowed region from OGLE 6 events (“O6”) is also shown as the gray shaded region [ 20 ] . PBH mass functions are drawn for \(f_{{tot}}=1\) with \(\langle M\rangle\) set at the 2 \(\sigma\) blue contour boundaries, while \(k_{{min}}\) is fitted to NANOGrav data at 2 \(\sigma\) . Mass functions without an IR cutoff are also shown for comparison (thin dotted). Other observational constraints include Subaru-HSC 2019 (light red dashed) [ 153 ] , EROS (brown dashed) [ 154 ] , OGLE relaxed (purple shaded) and strict (purple dot-dashed) [ 155 ] , LIGO asymmetric merger (orange wiggling shaded) [ 156 ] , LIGO merger (orange shaded) [ 157 ] , LIGO stochastic background (orange dashed) [ 158 ] , LIGO direct search (orange dotted) [ 16 ] , and CMB disk accretion (steel blue shaded) [ 159 ] .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：蓝色和红色阴影轮廓分别显示了当Subaru-HSC的所有12个微引力透镜候选体（“S12”）或4个可靠候选体（“S4”）归因于PBHs时，PBH丰度的68%（1 \(\sigma\) ）和95%（2 \(\sigma\) ）置信水平允许区域[21]。来自OGLE 6个事件（“O6”）的95%置信水平允许区域也显示为灰色阴影区域[20]。PBH质量函数绘制为\(f_{{tot}}=1\)，其中\(\langle M\rangle\)设置在2 \(\sigma\)蓝色轮廓边界处，而\(k_{{min}}\)拟合到NANOGrav数据的2 \(\sigma\)。同时显示了没有红外截止的质量函数以作比较（细虚线）。其他观测约束包括Subaru-HSC 2019（浅红色虚线）[153]、EROS（棕色虚线）[154]、OGLE宽松（紫色阴影）和严格（紫色点划线）[155]、LIGO不对称并合（橙色波浪阴影）[156]、LIGO并合（橙色阴影）[157]、LIGO随机背景（橙色虚线）[158]、LIGO直接搜索（橙色点线）[16]和CMB盘吸积（钢蓝色阴影）[159]。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : GW spectrum \(\Omega_{{GW}}\) induced by a top-hat curvature power spectrum. The dark-blue line and shaded region represent the spectrum for the best-fit parameter and the 2- \(\sigma\) C.L., respectively, inferred from the NANOGrav 15-yr data [ 180 ] and the Subaru-HSC sample of all candidates [ 21 ] , while the light-blue shaded region assumes 4 secure candidates. The first 14 bins of the NANOGrav signal [ 180 ] is shown in green violins together with some future observational projects, including the Roman Telescope (Seagreen) [ 36 , 37 ] , binary resonances (BRs) (Lightblue) [ 39 , 40 ] shown in LLR (dashed), eLO (dot-dashed), and eSLR (dotted) configurations, LISA (Red) [ 11 ] , Taiji (Orange) [ 12 ] , and TianQin (Pink) [ 13 ] . The gray-shaded region is the bound from relativistic DOF from CMB/BBN [ 181 , 182 , 183 , 184 , 185 ] .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：由顶帽曲率功率谱诱导的GW谱\(\Omega_{{GW}}\)。深蓝色线和阴影区域分别代表从NANOGrav 15年数据[180]和Subaru-HSC所有候选体样本[21]推断的最佳拟合参数和2-\(\sigma\)置信水平的谱，而浅蓝色阴影区域假设为4个可靠候选体。NANOGrav信号[180]的前14个频段以绿色小提琴图显示，同时显示了一些未来的观测项目，包括罗马望远镜（海绿色）[36,37]、双星共振（BRs）（浅蓝色）[39,40]以LLR（虚线）、eLO（点划线）和eSLR（点线）配置显示、LISA（红色）[11]、太极（橙色）[12]和天琴（粉色）[13]。灰色阴影区域是来自CMB/BBN的相对论性自由度约束[181,182,183,184,185]。

figures.caption_en: Figure E1 : The threshold of density contrast \(\delta_{{c}}(M)\) for different shape factor \(q\) , as a function of horizon mass \(M_{H}\) . See the text for details.
figures.caption_zh: 图E1：不同形状因子\(q\)的密度对比度阈值\(\delta_{{c}}(M)\)，作为视界质量\(M_{H}\)的函数。详情见正文。

figures.caption_en: Figure E2 : PBH mass function (upper panel) and induced GW spectrum (lower panel) with \(f_{{tot}}=1\) and \(\langle M\rangle=4\times 10^{-7}~M_{\odot}\) , for different threshold \(\delta_{{c}}\) . The parameters are shown in the table. In PTA data, there is a pronounced correlation between the power spectrum amplitude \(\mathcal{A}_{\mathcal{R}}\) and the IR cutoff \(k_{\min}\) , which are adjusted accordingly for different \(\delta_{{c}}\) (see text for details). The thin dotted curves are the mass functions and induced GW spectra without an IR cutoff, which exhibit strong tension with LVK constraints and PTA observations, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图E2：对于不同阈值\(\delta_{{c}}\)，在\(f_{{tot}}=1\)和\(\langle M\rangle=4\times 10^{-7}~M_{\odot}\)下的PBH质量函数（上方面板）和诱导GW谱（下方面板）。参数显示在表格中。在PTA数据中，功率谱振幅\(\mathcal{A}_{\mathcal{R}}\)与红外截止\(k_{\min}\)之间存在显著相关性，它们根据不同的\(\delta_{{c}}\)进行相应调整（详情见正文）。细虚线曲线是没有红外截止的质量函数和诱导GW谱，它们分别与LVK约束和PTA观测表现出强烈矛盾。
